description:
Hello,

I'd like to book a guided group tour for a senior center outing of about 20 people in early October. Could you share availability and group rates?

Thank you,
Diane Merrill
subject: Group tour booking for senior center outing

description:
Hi,

My mother uses a wheelchair. Is the DC-3 exhibit boarding ramp accessible, and are wheelchairs available to borrow at the entrance?

Thanks,
Greg Santana
subject: Wheelchair access at the DC-3 exhibit

description:
Hello,

My family membership expired and I'd like to renew it. Can the renewal be processed online and emailed to me?

Best,
Carmen Flores
subject: Membership renewal question

description:
Hi,

What are the museum hours this Saturday, and do you offer a discounted rate for active military and veterans?

Thank you,
Patrick Donnelly
subject: Saturday hours and veteran admission rate

description:
Hello,

I think I left a pair of sunglasses near the flight-sim kiosk during my visit on Sunday. Has anything been turned in?

Thanks,
Rachel Holmes
subject: Lost item near the flight-sim kiosk

description:
Hi,

I'd like to register my two children for the summer aviation camp. What ages do you accept and is the July session still open?

Regards,
Nathan Briggs
subject: Summer aviation camp registration

description:
Hello,

Would it be possible to reserve the hangar gallery for a private evening reception of about 50 guests? Please send pricing and dates.

Thank you,
Teresa Vaughn
subject: Private event rental in the hangar gallery

description:
Hi,

I'm interested in volunteering as a docent. Could you tell me about the next training session and how to apply?

Thanks,
Marcus Webb
subject: Becoming a volunteer docent

description:
Hi,

Does the museum have parking for a 40-foot tour bus, and is there a drop-off area near the main entrance?

Thank you,
Angela Foster
subject: Bus parking and drop-off for group visit

description:
Hello,

I purchased two tickets online but never received the confirmation email. Can you resend it to this address?

Thanks,
Derek Shaw
subject: Missing ticket confirmation email

description:
Hi,

Is the flight simulator exhibit suitable for an 8-year-old, and does it require an extra ticket?

Regards,
Linda Pruitt
subject: Flight simulator age suitability

description:
Hello,

I'd like to make a memorial donation in my late father's name. He was a former pilot. How should I go about it?

Thank you,
Howard Kim
subject: Memorial donation in honor of a former pilot

description:
Hi,

The online gift shop showed a model B-17 in stock but my order was canceled. Is it being restocked?

Thanks,
Raul Estrada
subject: Gift shop model aircraft out of stock

description:
Hello,

Can you tell me whether photography with a tripod is permitted inside the main hangar?

Best,
Susan Crane
subject: Tripod photography policy in the hangar

description:
Hi,

My school would like to schedule a field trip for two fourth-grade classes in March. What's the booking process?

Thank you,
Andrew Lewis
subject: Field trip booking for fourth-grade classes

description:
Hello,

I'm a member but the website won't recognize my login for the members-only event registration. Can you reset it?

Thanks,
Jason Andrews
subject: Member login not working for event registration

description:
Hi,

Is there a quiet hour or low-sensory time slot available? My son does better with fewer crowds and lower noise.

Regards,
Dominic Flores
subject: Low-sensory visiting times

description:
Hello,

I'd like to add my spouse to my existing membership. Can that be done without buying a new one?

Thank you,
Tanya Woods
subject: Adding a spouse to an existing membership

description:
Hi,

The restored DC-3 cockpit tour was the highlight of our visit. Is there a way to leave feedback for the docent who led it?

Thanks,
Brittany Bowen
subject: Feedback for an excellent cockpit tour docent

description:
Hello,

Do you offer corporate sponsorship packages for the spring fundraiser? Our firm would like to be involved.

Best,
Margaret House
subject: Corporate sponsorship for the spring fundraiser
